title: Halal Tomato Toast
description: A sweet and chewy Portuguese dish featuring cherry tomatoes that pairs perfectly with a post-workout snack or meal.

ingredients.name: whole wheat bread
ingredients.notes: preferably whole grain for added nutrition

instructions: Place the bread slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle olive oil over each slice and sprinkle salt evenly over them. Use tongs or spatula to distribute evenly.
Carefully place the prepared toast in the preheated oven for about 5-7 minutes, until golden brown and crispy.
While the bread is baking, chop cherry tomatoes into small pieces.
Once the toast is done, remove from the oven and immediately drizzle more olive oil over them to prevent sticking.
Arrange tomato pieces on top of each slice of toast.
Serve hot or at room temperature as a quick and satisfying snack post-workout.
